prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: chapter poster. Story world: Dead Channel Protocol. Premise: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.. Setting: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Threat presence: Root Administrator. Recurring motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Arc focus: Confrontation and Reckoning (ENDGAME). Summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller. Tone: GROUNDED. Arc focus: Confrontation and Reckoning (ENDGAME). Summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Immediate scene brief: Dead Channel Protocol - Confrontation and Reckoning Arc Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Arc focus: Confrontation and Reckoning (ENDGAME). Summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.
